assertions.description: Mermaid syntax parses via mmdc --dry-run (or returns install-hint fallback without erroring)
At least 10 edges, most with verb/preposition labels

cases.prompt: Mind map of the French Revolution for 5th graders.

assertions.description: Mermaid mindmap OR Markmap file produced

assertions.criterion: Vocabulary is 5th-grade-appropriate — no college-level terms like 'ancien régime' or 'bourgeoisie' without plain-language gloss. Labels ≤ 3 words.

cases.prompt: Prerequisite tree for calculus, college level.

assertions.description: DOT or Mermaid prerequisite tree produced
Includes algebra and trigonometry feeding into calculus

assertions.criterion: Edges flow from prerequisite concepts (algebra, trig, limits) TOWARD calculus, not the other way around. Reading the graph should answer 'what do I need before calculus?'.

cases.prompt: Visualize this chapter as a concept map. [pasted 500-word excerpt about cellular respiration, mitochondria, glucose breakdown, ATP, and aerobic vs. anaerobic pathways]

assertions.criterion: Every node label appears verbatim or as a close paraphrase in the source excerpt. No hallucinated concepts (no 'Krebs cycle' unless the source mentions it).

assertions.description: A rendered artifact exists OR render.py fallback ran gracefully and printed install hints
≥ 70% of edges carry a verb/preposition label (Novak concept-map requirement for grades 6+)

cases.prompt: Timeline of the civil rights movement.

assertions.description: ≥ 5 events with a year or date prefix
Events appear in chronological order in the source file
render.py produces a PNG OR exits 0 with install hints when mmdc is missing
